title: Green Devil Scorpion Temple
content:
Green Devil Scorpion Temple
 is a secret organisation collectively run by the 
Green Devil Continent
's Three Great Sects.

The three ancestors of the Green Devil Continent chose countless talented children to enter the Green Devil Scorpion Temple to become servants of the Green Devil Scorpion. Over the countless years, many children were brought to the temple, but after countless rounds of eliminations and death, only nine of them obtained the recognition of the Green Devil. These nine people became the 
Green Devil Messengers
 of the Green Devil Continent. They are the inheritors of the will of the Green Devil Scorpion that is suppressed under the Green Devil Continent.
